title: PYPL Earnings Preview Q2 2022
text: PayPal was to release earnings for Q2 2022 on August 2. The consensus EPS forecast for Q2 2022 was $0.54, down from $0.88 EPS in the same quarter the prior year. Oppenheimer estimated Q2 2022 earnings at $0.50 EPS and set a $101.00 price target. In the past four quarters, PayPal had missed expectations twice. The company's weakness in the international market was expected to be a significant headwind.
